name: findings from multiple different tools are each grouped under their own rule key in a single report
command: printf '%s' '{"version":"2.1.0","runs":[{"tool":{"driver":{"name":"checkov"}},"results":[{"ruleId":"CKV_K8S_16","level":"error","message":{"text":"x"}}]}]}' > a.sarif && printf '%s' '{"version":"2.1.0","runs":[{"tool":{"driver":{"name":"ruff"}},"results":[{"ruleId":"F401","level":"error","message":{"text":"y"}}]}]}' > b.sarif && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/group-findings-by-rule.sh" --dir . 2>e.txt; grep -q 'group-by-rule rules=2 findings=2' e.txt && grep -q 'rule=checkov/CKV_K8S_16' e.txt && grep -q 'rule=ruff/F401' e.txt && echo multi-tool-grouped 1>&2
